title: CLI lacks a human-render mode (--format / terse / --raw) the script twins provide
description: The CLI emits only the --json envelope or the op's own renderOpResultText text; 15+ orchestrator op-twin scripts offer --format table|chain|summary|csv plus a renderTerse default and --raw for config/schema. Direct CLI users get structured JSON or the op's terse text, with no human-oriented render layer. Closable CLI-side without touching ops (a CLI-only render layer in-pi dispatch never sees).

evidence.reference: CLI emits boundedJsonOutput (--json) or renderOpResultText only — no --format/render dispatch
representative op-twin scripts provide --format table|chain|summary|csv + renderTerse default + --raw; the CLI has no equivalent
GAP-3 in the parity survey (§C/§D), categorized CLI-only-shared-helper

impact: Direct CLI/dogfooding users (human or agent) get no human-readable rendering for the 15+ ops whose script twins do — a capability asymmetry between the two surfaces over the same data.
proposed_resolution: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
